name: Stroke · F.A.S.T.
summary: Blood vessel burst or clot in the brain. Brain is being starved of oxygen — every minute counts.
recognition: FACE — has it fallen on one side? Can they smile?
ARMS — can they raise both and keep them up?
TIME — any of these, call 999 immediately

callEmergency.text: Call 999 if you see ANY of the FAST signs.

steps: Stay with them. Reassure them help is coming.
Lay them down with head and shoulders raised.
If not breathing normally — start CPR.

source: UKA First Aid Essentials · Module 2 · NHS FAST campaign
